categorytransclude-desc: Renders and transcludes members of a category dynamically into a page.
categorytransclude-error-empty: The category "$1" has no members matching the criteria.
categorytransclude-error-recursion: Error: Self-transclusion detected or recursive limit exceeded.
categorytransclude-error-limit-clamped: Warning: Requested limit exceeds the maximum allowable ($1). Clamped to $2.
